ee and Haiyang Zheng In IFAC Conference on Analysis and Design of Hybrid Systems (ADHS'06) held in Alghero, Sardinia, June 7-9, 2006. Prepublished version Published version ABSTRACT HyVisual is a hybrid systems modeling framework providing a block di

id systems modeling framework providing a block diagram visual syntax for specifying continuous dynamics and a bubble-and-arc syntax for specifying modal behavior. It is based on Ptolemy II, is written in Java, and is distributed open-source at http:
n in Java, and is distributed open-source at http://ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu/hyvisual/. Contact Update Help Update Copyright © 1999 - UC Regents; all rights reserved.
